insights.eyebrow: WHICH POSTS BRING IN MORE DONATIONS
insights.headline: This page estimates which posts are likely to bring higher donation amounts.
insights.lede: Typical gift in this file is about PHP 4,557. 343 posts raised much less than expected. Review those posts for timing, message, and channel.

prediction_cards.label: How reliable this estimate is
prediction_cards.definition: R² for predicted vs actual donation amount on holdout posts (higher = more variance explained).

prediction_cards.label: Typical miss size
prediction_cards.definition: Root mean squared error of predictions on the holdout set (same units as the target).

prediction_cards.label: Biggest post signal
prediction_cards.hint: This mattered most in the ranking
prediction_cards.definition: Gradient boosting feature with highest importance for ranking predicted donation amounts.

cause_cards.title: One strong pattern: post type EventPromotion
cause_cards.body: This factor shows a clear link with higher or lower donation amounts in the data.
cause_cards.definition: OLS-style association in historical posts—helpful for themes, not a guarantee for the next post.

cause_cards.title: Uses only info you know before posting
cause_cards.body: This keeps the guidance useful during planning, not after results are in.
cause_cards.definition: Features are limited to what staff would know when scheduling or drafting a post.

cause_cards.title: How to use this page
cause_cards.body: Use top cards for planning. Use tables below for post-by-post review.
cause_cards.definition: Hero metrics summarize the model; tables and detail panels are for individual post decisions.

calls_to_action: Review Post #335 (TikTok/ImpactStory). It raised less than expected.
Review Post #125 (YouTube/ImpactStory). It raised less than expected.
